tools.name: developers.getEvents
tools.description: By passing in the company, site or deal Id a set of user interaction event records is returned. For pagination of a large result set use queryexecutionid and nexttoken instead.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
